name: micro-exp
description: /micro-exp [scope] — context-driven micro-experiment sweep orchestrator. Self-enumerate sweep candidates from the conversation / active domain (no manifest file — like /cycle) → rent pods (≤budget) → copy inputs → run → 🛰️ Monitor (pw.x|ph.x alive-check) → on JOB DONE harvest+down + dispatch parse Agent → atlas register on 🟢 (generic verify-delegation, folds direct to embedded.gen.hexa) → aggregate ledger at exports/sweep/<batch>/. The inverse of 1-big-run: N small verify-able experiments in parallel, atlas auto-folds. Honest sweep — FALSIFIED is CLOSED negative, not skipped (per @D g63). Bare = current context · arg = scope filter. Distinct from /cycle (milestone-driven loop) and /all-bg-go (reactive single fan-out). Triggers — '/micro-exp', '스윕 던져', '수십개 동시', 'micro experiment fan-out', 'sweep these', 'verify-driven sweep'.
